name: mouse
description: AI-powered smart autocomplete for any browser text field

scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts && vite build --config vite.docs-frame.config.ts
scripts.dev: concurrently "vite build --watch" "vite build --config vite.content.config.ts --watch" "vite build --config vite.docs-frame.config.ts --watch"
